textByHashes.4c9d4db35ab9ce0270d94a495c7c262814383d56: Are you ? Did you help Zanik save the city?
textByHashes.6fc3c987551628f8bd180f7166657201645e8148: When I'm older I'm going to be an adventurer, just like Zanik!
textByHashes.c91a60cf7cdf19cc136fd4f7f7bc599ccd5b8750: [laugh]! You look funny! All tall and skinny with tiny eyes!
textByHashes.70ab2ebfb09ccf04705862341ad3ab8a436a361a: Help! Help! The surface people are attacking!
textByHashes.da83c60ae09aa2d9a62bf6d306600908826d5ff8: Sorry, I'm not meant to talk to strangers.
textByHashes.6a65c58a53885bdad44bd5f7017339b3c5dea89c: Are you really from the surface?
